Class OpenAiResponsesProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.openai.OpenAiResponsesProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class OpenAiResponsesProvider extends AbstractAiProvider
Clean-room provider for OpenAI, strictly utilizing the modern Responses API (/v1/responses).

This provider is designed for native agentic workflows, supporting built-in tools and stateful item-based history. It handles model discovery and API key management for the OpenAI platform.

Author:
anahata

    ensureKeysFileExists, findModel, getAllSupportedActions, getCurrentKey, getKeysAcquisitionUri, getKeysFilePath, getModels, getNextKey, getProviderDirectory, getProviderId, hasKeys, hokusPocus, refreshModels, reloadKeyPool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ensureKeysFileExists()
    Ensures that the api_keys.txt file exists on the host filesystem.
    Optional<? extends AbstractModel>
    findModel(String modelId)
    Finds a single model by its unique ID within this provider.
    Set<String>
    getAllSupportedActions()
    Gets a set of all unique supported actions across all models offered by this provider, using the cached model list.
    String
    getCurrentKey()
    Returns the API key currently in use by this provider instance.
    URI
    getKeysAcquisitionUri()
    Gets the URI where users can acquire API keys for this provider.
    Path
    getKeysFilePath()
    Resolves the path to the api_keys.txt file for this provider.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    getModels()
    Gets the list of models, using a lazy-loaded cache.
    protected String
    getNextKey()
    Selects the next API key from the pool using a round-robin strategy.
    Path
    getProviderDirectory()
    Resolves the absolute path to the provider's storage directory.
    String
    getProviderId()
    Compatibility alias for getUuid() to maintain integration with existing IDE and UI components that expect a provider ID.
    boolean
    hasKeys()
    Checks if there are any valid (non-comment, non-empty) API keys configured for this provider.
    void
    hokusPocus()
    Resets the internal state of the provider, typically to force a key rotation.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    refreshModels()
    Clears the local model cache and forces a reload from the API on the next call to AbstractAiProvider.getModels().
    void
    reloadKeyPool()
    Reloads the API key pool from the provider's specific configuration file.

  • Field Details

    • API_MAPPER

      private static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper API_MAPPER
      Internal Jackson mapper for OpenAI API JSON processing.

    • verifiedOrganization

      private boolean verifiedOrganization
      Flag indicating if the configured API key belongs to a verified OpenAI organization.

      Verified organizations are permitted to use store: true and receive plain-text reasoning summaries in their responses without throwing a 400 parameter error on subsequent turns.

    • httpClient

      private transient HttpClient httpClient
      The HTTP client used for all communication with the OpenAI API.

      Marked as transient to prevent serialization of the networking stack.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiResponsesProvider

      public OpenAiResponsesProvider()
      Constructs a new OpenAiProvider with the 'OpenAI' UUID and standard tokenizer settings.

    • OpenAiResponsesProvider

      public OpenAiResponsesProvider(String uuid)
      Constructs a new OpenAiProvider with a custom UUID.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the unique provider identifier.

  • Method Details

    • getHttpClient

      public HttpClient getHttpClient()
      Lazy-initializes and returns the HTTP client for this provider.

      Ensures standard timeouts and redirect policies are applied.

      Returns:
      The active HTTP client.

    • createRequestBuilder

      public HttpRequest.Builder createRequestBuilder(String endpoint)
      Creates an authorized HTTP Request Builder for the specified endpoint.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - the target sub-resource endpoint (e.g. "responses").
      Returns:
      a pre-configured, authorized HttpRequest Builder.

    • listModels

      public List<? extends AbstractModel> listModels()
      Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API. This method is intended to be called by the caching mechanism.

      Implementation details: Executes a GET request to the /models endpoint of the configured getBaseUrl(). Discovered models are filtered to include only those supported by the Responses API (gpt-4o and successor generations).

      Specified by:
      listModels in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      A list of provider-specific AbstractModel objects.

    • isRetryable

      public boolean isRetryable(int statusCode, String responseBody)
      Determines if an HTTP status code or response body indicates a transient failure that should trigger a retry or rotation.
      Parameters:
      statusCode - The HTTP status code returned by the server.
      responseBody - The raw response body string.
      Returns:
      true if the request can be retried, false otherwise.

    • getApiKeyHint

      public String getApiKeyHint()
      Gets a template or hint string to display when the API keys file is empty.

      Provides a template for the OpenAI api_keys.txt file.

      Specified by:
      getApiKeyHint in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      The API key hint text.
